summary: Replace placeholder MCP metadata with the normative Appendix B descriptions and input schemas, and reject missing or unknown arguments at the validation boundary.

decisions.decision: Publish each Appendix B description and closed input schema through tools/list, while retaining open nested parameter/value objects exactly where the specification permits them.
decisions.rationale: Generic placeholder metadata could mislead external agents and could not communicate required fields or the export allow-list; the normative schema is the authoritative contract.

decisions.decision: Reject missing required fields, unknown top-level arguments, invalid path shapes, non-object parameter values, non-boolean createIfMissing, and non-finite numeric dimensions before dispatch.
decisions.rationale: Validation must fail closed at the protocol boundary so handlers never receive ambiguous or out-of-contract requests.

testEvidence.criterion: Appendix B MCP contracts and validation remain correct.
testEvidence.test: Run focused MCP tool, dispatcher, and stdio tests once; run lint and provenance validation once.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/mcp/mcp-tools.test.ts tests/application/mcp/mcp-dispatcher.test.ts tests/application/mcp/mcp-stdio.test.ts
red.outcome: RED: no pre-change red test was required for metadata-only contract completion; the new assertions were written against the normative contract before implementation.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/mcp/mcp-tools.test.ts tests/application/mcp/mcp-dispatcher.test.ts tests/application/mcp/mcp-stdio.test.ts; pnpm.cmd lint; pnpm.cmd check:provenance
green.outcome: GREEN: 3 files and 8 tests passed; lint and source policy passed; provenance ledger passed validation.

questions: Desktop stdio lifecycle, Appendix B response handlers, permission UI, and AC-11.b/c remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
